title: Adult (12+) current-smoking prevalence by province and year, Canada 2007-2019 (CCHS, stitched across the 2015 redesign)
vintage: Canadian Community Health Survey current-smoker (daily or occasional) prevalence, 'Total, 12 years and over', both sexes, percent + 95% CI, one row per (province, year). Stitched from two StatCan tables across the 2015 CCHS redesign: 13-10-0451 (health indicators, 2007-2014, pre-redesign) and 13-10-0096 (health characteristics annual estimates, 2015-2019). Ontario's pre-2015 province total is the 'Ontario by Health Unit' rollup; all other provinces use their plain name.
notes: Attribution required by the Statistics Canada Open Licence: 'Adapted from Statistics Canada, tables 13-10-0451 and 13-10-0096. This does not constitute an endorsement by Statistics Canada of this product.' The two source tables download only as full-table zips (13-10-0096 ~5 MB; 13-10-0451 ~140 MB); scripts/menthol_harvest.py downloads both (via curl for the large one), subsets to the smoking total + CI, and writes this compact frozen file. The 2015 redesign is a level break common to all provinces, so the difference-in-differences nets it out. The menthol-ban treatment dates are design constants in the builder (Canada Gazette / provincial legislation), not part of this frozen outcome panel.
